title: [MTR3/4] 납작이 | Flat face trains
description: Resource pack that adds Seoul Metro 1000/4000 series, and Korail Classes 311000, 341000 and 351000 into Minecraft via Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
_A resource pack for Minecraft Transit Railway._

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Merry Christmas! 메리 크리스마스!

</details>

# Overview
**"Flat face" (납작이)** is a nickname given to various trains running in the Seoul Metropolitan Subway system. They are Seoul Metro 1000 and 4000 series, and 1st generation of Korail Classes 311000, 341000 and 351000.

Seoul Metro 1000 series and Korail Class 311000 runs on Seoul Subway Line 1. Former can only run between Yangju and Gwangmyeong (from Geumcheon-gu Office), and latter can run on the full length of the line.

Seoul Metro 4000 series and Korail Class 341000 runs on Seoul Subway Line 4. Former runs on the full length of the line, and latter can run between ~~Danggogae~~ Buramsan and Oido (i.e. Line 4 without Jinjeop Line).

Korail Class 351000 runs on the Suin-Bundang Line between Cheongnyangni / Wangsimni and Incheon.

# What will be in this pack?
### Seoul Metro 1000 series (2nd generation):
1. 1st / 2nd batch
### Seoul Metro 4000 series:
1. 1st / 2nd batch
### Korail Class 311000:
1. 1st generation
### Korail Class 341000:
1. 1st generation
### Korail Class 315000:
1. 1st generation

# Disclaimer
This resource pack is not associated with, and is not an official product of, Seoul Transportation Corporation and its predecessors, and Korea Railroad Corporation.

# Credits
Soodari for creating all retextures except Seoul Metro 4000 series (base model).
